---
title: "About"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Overview
This site presents the code and results of demultiplexing and QC of paired BAL and PBMC single-cell RNA-seq data used for Chapter 3 of Wong ATC's PhD thesis [1].

For all code and documentation, refer to the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/ansontcw/cf-pbmc-bal-scrna).

Developers: Anson Wong, Hieu T Nim
<br>Affiliation: Transcriptomics & Bioinformatics Group, Stem Cell Medicine Theme, Murdoch Children's Research Institute

## References
[1] Wong ATC. Integrated airway and blood immune profiling in early life cystic fibrosis [PhD thesis]. Melbourne: University of Melbourne; 2026.
